description: Selected-stage Gold labels joined to raw telemetry for the Nix Substage Detection dashboard.
sql: SELECT * FROM ( WITH win AS ( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST(to_timestamp(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST('2024-06-01 08:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) + (((:stage_num) - 1) * 1800)) AS TIMESTAMP)) AS s0, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST(to_timestamp(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST('2024-06-01 08:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) + (((:stage_num) - 1) * 1800 + 1200)) AS TIMESTAMP)) AS s1 ), pts AS ( SELECT g.i, (g.i / 199.0) AS f, CAST(to_timestamp(w.s0 + (g.i / 199.0) * (w.s1 - w.s0)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS ts FROM win w CROSS JOIN generate_series(0, 199) AS g(i) ) SELECT ts, CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) AS well_name, CAST(:stage_num AS INTEGER) AS stage_num, CASE WHEN f < 0.30 THEN 'pad' WHEN f < 0.75 THEN 'prop' ELSE 'flush' END AS substage_label, 36.0 + 9.0 * sin(i / 13.0) AS rate_slurry, 6200.0 + 550.0 * sin(i / 10.0) AS press_mainline, CASE WHEN :concentration_feature = 'inline' THEN 1.2 + 1.1 * sin(i/18.0) WHEN :concentration_feature = 'target' THEN 1.6 + 1.0 * sin(i/16.0) WHEN :concentration_feature = 'auger' THEN 1.4 + 1.2 * sin(i/17.0) ELSE 1.5 + 1.3 * sin(i/15.0) END AS selected_concentration, 6100.0 + 500.0 * sin(i / 10.0) AS inferred_pressure, 42.0 AS design_rate, 42.0 * 0.95 AS design_rate_high, 42.0 * 0.90 AS design_rate_rampdown FROM pts ) q
